title: Coda Token Management and One-Time Display Message
story: As a DataTools Pro user setting up the Coda integration, I want to generate and manage API tokens on the Coda settings page with a clear one-time display warning so that I understand the importance of securely storing the token immediately.
description:
Add API token management to the Coda settings page, following the same UX pattern as the existing DataTools Pro API token management.

When a user generates a new token, a notification message must appear: "This token is displayed one time. We recommend storing this token in a key vault or key management solution."

This message reinforces secure token handling practices and appears as a popup when the user saves the token.
acceptance_criteria: Coda settings page includes token management functionality matching the API token UX pattern
User can generate a new API token for Coda
One-time display warning appears when a token is generated: 'This token is displayed one time. We recommend storing this token in a key vault or key management solution.'
User can revoke an existing token
User can copy the token value
Token is only displayed once and cannot be retrieved after dismissal
ux_changes: Token management section on the /coda settings page with generate, revoke, copy, and view actions. One-time display popup message warns users to securely store their token immediately upon generation.
middleware_changes: Token generation and management service for Coda API tokens, following the same pattern as existing API token management.
api_changes: Token CRUD endpoints for Coda integration tokens: generate, revoke, and validate.
implementation_notes: Follows the same token management UX pattern established for the DataTools Pro API tokens. The one-time display pattern ensures tokens are shown only once and cannot be retrieved afterward, encouraging secure storage practices.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the token management and deployed to dev, stage, and production.
